title: hedyotis longifolia var. tenuifolia
intro: Hedyotis longifolia var. tenuifolia, also known as Chang Shan, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hedyotis longifolia var. tenuifolia include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections and skin conditions. Hedyotis longifolia var. tenuifolia is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
